The Residence

An upper-floor residence with a private balcony framing the bay, tucked into the terracotta terraces of Manastiri. The open-plan living space and double bedroom are bright and uncomplicated — a home that asks little and gives back the sea. Within the gates lie the pool, taverna, beach bar and Belvedere Garden, with Ksamil and Corfu close at hand.
